A '''blossoming gulper''' was an aquatic predator from [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. It would bury itself in the sand at the bottom of the sea and leave its petal arms, which resembled the [[seatree]], to wave naturally with the current. When a creature brushed an arm, it would be seized by the gulper and eaten.<ref name="GatORW" />
